Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-23 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows two exceptional performers at the top of the momentum rankings. TNGX leads with a score of 97.6 and rank #1, displaying extraordinary consistency across all timeframes—particularly a 1-year return of 1,022% paired with perfect SMA alignment (above all four major moving averages) and near-perfect ratio progression (5 out of 5 passes). PL ranks second with a 683% one-year return and similarly strong fundamentals, though it shows more volatility in shorter timeframes (a 25.48% single-day jump) and a notably higher bad-spy-day score of 2.81 versus TNGX's 0.38, suggesting PL struggles more when the broader market declines. TNGX's strength appears more durable, with tighter ratio consistency and superior resilience during market downturns, while PL's momentum, though impressive in absolute terms, is more reactive and potentially more fragile.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
